expectations.text: PRD is located and read fully before generating visual docs
expectations.evidence: **Decision point:** Since no PRD exists, the skill must handle this gracefully. Two paths are available:

expectations.text: /generate_user_flows command is invoked with the PRD file path
expectations.evidence: 1. **Ask the user** to provide a PRD or product description (per the `/generate_user_flows` command's fallback behavior)

expectations.text: Next workflow steps are offered including /prism-plan and /prism-implement
